summary: Removed the proactive on-member-add republish branch from MarmotContext.tsx onMembersChanged. With this change, growing the member count no longer triggers a profile rumor send — the request/response mechanism (stories 02-06) is the new source of truth for newcomer profile discovery. Boy-scout cleanup: dead `prevMemberCount` declaration and write removed. onHistorySynced introduction (newcomer self-publish on first sync) and inviteByNpub republish (inviter pushes profile after invite) are preserved verbatim.
acceptance_criteria_satisfied: AC-027 — `if (currentMembers.length > prevMemberCount && signerRef.current)` block removed; grep returns 0 occurrences of `currentMembers.length > ` and 0 occurrences of `prevMemberCount`
AC-028 — onHistorySynced introduction preserved verbatim — log lines at MarmotContext.tsx:784, 787, 789 unchanged
AC-029 — inviteByNpub republish preserved verbatim — `inviter profile publish after invite` at MarmotContext.tsx:997 unchanged

files_changed.delta: Net -16 lines, 0 added. Removed: (1) `let prevMemberCount = mlsMembers.length;` declaration + comment (3 lines around line 533-536); (2) BUG FIX comment block (6 lines); (3) `if (currentMembers.length > prevMemberCount && signerRef.current) { ... }` block (8 lines); (4) `prevMemberCount = currentMembers.length;` dead write (1 line).

verification_method: team-lead grep + tsc + test-unit (mechanical change, no examiner needed)
decision: FAST PATH pass — mechanical deletion verified by grep, tsc clean, no test regressions.
design_decisions_summary: Boy-scout cleanup: dead `prevMemberCount` removed alongside the if-block whose only purpose was to read it.
Spec line numbers (709-716) were stale due to story 01's wire-format upgrade; architect re-grepped before editing and found the block at 770-785.

onHistorySynced and inviteByNpub republish kept untouched per AC-028 and AC-029 — these are still needed: newcomers self-introduce on first sync, and the inviter immediately pushes their profile to a fresh invitee.
out_of_scope_left_for_subsequent_stories: Story 05 — sweepStaleProfiles + app-start sweep + requestProfilesIfStale + group-open sweep call from pages/groups.tsx
Story 06 — handleIncomingProfileRequest + notifyProfileObserved bodies; pending-relay timer Map; PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND arm calls notifyProfileObserved
Story 07 — full E2E coverage of the six scenarios + helpers
